mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ${schema}.ALRMHI WHERE CREDATE < TO_CHAR(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -1 MONTH), 'YYYYMMDD')
mapper.select:
SELECT WAREKEY, STKDYTM FROM ${schema}.MWARMA
AND WHUSEYN = 'Y'
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM ${schema}.WSTKDY
AND STKDATE IN( SELECT STKDATE FROM ${schema}.WSTKDY WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND STKDATE < TO_CHAR(DATE_ADD( NOW(), INTERVAL -3 MONTH), 'YYYYMMDD') AND STKDATE != CONCAT(SUBSTRING(STKDATE, 1, 6), '01') AND STKDATE != CONCAT(SUBSTRING(STKDATE, 1, 6), '15') AND STKDATE != TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(STKDATE), 'YYYYMMDD') GROUP BY STKDATE )
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ${schema}.WSTKDY ( STKDATE , STKTIME , STOCKKY, WAREKEY , AREAKEY, LOCAKEY, LOLAYER, SAVEPNT , LOTNMKY, OWNERKY, OWNRNAM, CUSTCOD , CUSTNAM, FNCUSKY, FCNAMLC, SKUGRKY , SKUMKEY, SKUDESC, SKUWEIG, SKUWIDT , SKULENG, SKUTHIC, STLOTNB, GROSSWG , GROSSLN, GROSSWD, GROSSTH, BTRCATE , BTRFSTC, PURCNUM, ORDERLN, REGIKEY , DESTKEY, REGIORG, REGIMOD, DESTORG , DEORGNM, DESTMOD, ITEMCOD, DEMODNM , DEMODYN, DEMDMAN, DEMPOCD, DEMDADR , DEMDTLN, STOTQTY, TASKQTY, SALLQTY , SBLOQTY, PLANQTY, PLCMQTY, SUOMKEY , ADDCOKY, POSHPDT, POSHPTM, POSHPDY , SHPLIMT, DELVDSR, STKMEMO, EMSKUYN , RCVDCDT, RCVDCTM, LOTAT01, LOTAT02 , LOTAT03, STKSTAT, BLOCKID, RCVDCKY , RCVDCIT, ADJSOKY, ADJSOIT, PHYSOKY , PHYSOIT, SHPDCKY, SHPDCIT, TASKOKY , TASKOIT, CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER , LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER, UPDTCHK ) SELECT TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD') AS STKDATE , TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'HH24MISS') AS STKTIME , STOCKKY, WAREKEY , AREAKEY, LOCAKEY, LOLAYER, SAVEPNT , LOTNMKY, OWNERKY, OWNRNAM, CUSTCOD , CUSTNAM, FNCUSKY, FCNAMLC, SKUGRKY , SKUMKEY, SKUDESC, SKUWEIG, SKUWIDT , SKULENG, SKUTHIC, STLOTNB, GROSSWG , GROSSLN, GROSSWD, GROSSTH, BTRCATE , BTRFSTC, PURCNUM, ORDERLN, REGIKEY , DESTKEY, REGIORG, REGIMOD, DESTORG , DEORGNM, DESTMOD, ITEMCOD, DEMODNM , DEMODYN, DEMDMAN, DEMPOCD, DEMDADR , DEMDTLN, STOTQTY, TASKQTY, SALLQTY , SBLOQTY, PLANQTY, PLCMQTY, SUOMKEY , ADDCOKY, POSHPDT, POSHPTM, POSHPDY , SHPLIMT, DELVDSR, STKMEMO, EMSKUYN , RCVDCDT, RCVDCTM, LOTAT01, LOTAT02 , LOTAT03, STKSTAT, BLOCKID, RCVDCKY , RCVDCIT, ADJSOKY, ADJSOIT, PHYSOKY , PHYSOIT, SHPDCKY, SHPDCIT, TASKOKY , TASKOIT, CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER , LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER, UPDTCHK FROM ${schema}.WSTKKY
AND WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND STOTQTY > 0
